message:
fix(messaging): use saturating_add for chunked reply counter, audit batch 403

ChunkedReplyObligation::receive_chunk() used plain += 1 for the
received_chunks counter, which could panic on overflow for unbounded
streams. Switch to saturating_add for consistency with the rest of
the file's arithmetic patterns.

Audit batch 403 (6 files, ~16,655 lines):
- circuit_breaker.rs (2090L): SOUND
- dual_run.rs (6645L, lines 3500+): SOUND
- oracle/rref_access.rs (633L): SOUND
- obligation/eprocess.rs (658L): SOUND
- messaging/service.rs (5654L): 1 LOW FIXED (saturating_add)
- messaging/session/synthesis.rs (975L): SOUND

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
